review_title: Perfect tool for automating your tasks
description: SyncSpider is like a central hub that allows you to automate any e-commerce business processes by integrating data from multiple online services. It allows you to synchronize data between any online store platform, your customer relationship management (CRM), your accounting package, and your shipping management software. From my experience that worth a lot to my clients and saves them time & money. This means that you can automatically import all orders and shipments into a client's accounting package and update their CRM with new customer information. I can now easily integrate all my tools and services into a very effective automation workflow. Already connected a few of my client's websites to sync data from Amazon, Shopify, WooCommerce, into Google Sheets. Then created a workflow that collects emails of new clients that made an order into their Mailchimp. Just started using SyncSpider and there are so many integration options that blow my mind. I highly recommend that service!
author: Dan L.
pros: Perfect tool for automating tasks. I'll explain a bit about what it's all about for anyone that didn't use such tools yet. As a business owner, I am constantly looking for ways to increase productivity, cut costs and improve my bottom line. There is no better way to do this than to automate things.
cons: I haven't stumbled yet at any issues yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Never worry about your data again. EUROPEAN ZAPIER ALTERNATIVE!
description: Without a doubt, SyncSpider is one of those tools that you need to have in your toolbox, especially if you are into e-commerce, where automation is a key factor. I had been looking at Zapier and Integromat alternatives for a while now, but no matter how much I have tested, none of them convinced me, until SyncSpider appeared. In Conclusion: If automations is something you need and you don't have another tool in the bag already, that does the same thing, then it's worth getting it for this competetive pricing and their service is also located in Austria/EU! That's just awesome for all automating-jobs that have to be done in european countries!
author: Marcel R.
pros: - Quick and helpful answers through the help chat - Handles big volumes of data - They've increased the rate of integration (this seemed to be common among the complaints). - SyncSpider have webhooks and external API.
cons: - Needs more integrations (which they're working on) - UI needs work (I think I saw somewhere that they're working on it). - Some integrations may require more technical grease - but they do have decent video tutorials and instructions you can follow and while I did not get to experience the support myself, other have reported that it was great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: ;( there's better out there.
description: Not worth it, though I have revisited several times.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: That I got it for free from Appsumo about 5 years ago or more.
cons: It doesn't have the serious integrations I'm looking for after all this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The Best Alternative to Zapier!
description: I really enjoy SyncSpider and am already making further plans to utilize it as much as I can for my creative studio business. Tools like this very much help out us small businesses and does wonders in saving us time and hassle. I can't wait to integrate it into my CRM and get my leads automated!
author: Michael K.
pros: I really like the fact that SyncSpider provides a much deeper integration with the tools I use compared to the basic integrations on Zapier. I also really enjoy it's big focus on e-commerce tools, it's really a major selling point for me. Not to mention the very detailed documentation. Great work by the folks on their team!
cons: It's still very new to the market and as such there isn't an awful lot of integrations just yet. I have faith in the guys over at SyncSpider and can't wait to see what they come up with over the next year or so!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great software to handle your e-commerce integrations
description: I'm happy, the main thing is that there's good support, so you can ask anytime if you need help.
author: Camilo B.
pros: I liked the most that once you get the hang of it, it's easy to create different integrations. The software covers a lot of common integrations and they are adding more constantly. Also, their support is great. They send emails, create events, and stay in contact to make sure you are using the tool or if you need help.
cons: In the beginning, it may not be as user-friendly as other integration platforms, so it takes some time of seeing help documents to handle some cases, but once you get used to it, it's easy to add integrations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good Software With Big Potential For Growth - Alternative To Zapier
description: They focus themselves more on the e-Commerce side, although they have the capabilities to go outside the industry. The lack of integration to popular softwares is the major downside of the software, but the ability to create custom integration built in the platform is great although it is difficult to do.
author: Christopher E.
pros: - The ability to create custom integration. - The ability to create multi integration in one task - Popular to e-Commerce industry, such as Shopify etc.
cons: - Not a lot of documentation of the custom integration creation; - Relatively small integration capabilities compared to others; - A bit slow GUI performance
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is one very very powerful tool that gives me lots of automation I always needed
description: overall SyncSpider is a solid tool that gets the job done and the team is working on making it better and better every day.
author: David M.
pros: There are new integrations that they are adding almost every week and they have pretty good documentation helping out every step along the way. So far even tools that are not supported by the support team helped me with showing me the documentation on how to use almost any API & Webhook.
cons: There is a slight learning curve on how the tasks work but once you get the hang of things its pretty simple
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SyncSpider is a promising catch
description: I was having trouble getting Zapier to sync reschedules with ActiveCampaign, but it was a piece of cake with SyncSpider. Overall, I'm happy with the service and I'm looking forward to it growing.
author: Justin T.
pros: I like the power behind the app. I'm able to tie together all of the programs I use to run my business so they function as I'd expect.
cons: The user interface could use polishing, it just feels like it was designed by a developer rather than a UI designer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A long time needed, easy to use Brigde
description: On appsumo they have a Lifetime deal! I love this kind of Lifetime deals, specially since managing multiple sales channels can be either crazy or a complete let down for clients when inventory has to be crosschecked. If your goal is to ace customer experience and accelerate the validation of a sale, then this tool is for you! Thanks for the tool!
author: Mario P.
pros: I've been looking for a tool like this since forever! Specially to connect inventory accross Amazon and Woocommerce. It's also a pretty good tool for direct income since you start your own business charging your clients a fee for managing the syncronization between their sites and channels. The amount of integrations is amazing and customer support is also super fast and responsive.
cons: Its easy to integrate, but it has so much connections that it can be overwhelming in a good way
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: It has simplified UI that going to make Using this software a no-brainer !
description: It helped me save hours of work at night for minutes plus it has the system of automation which means all you need to do is prepare everything then let it run itself :D
author: Ach H.
pros: This software is easy to use doesn't take too much time to try it out and is focused on E-Commerce. it helps you forget all the copy past tasks that you used to have to alte at night
cons: Some sofware I use aren't included yet but he cool thin they are hyper active about adding new tooks weekly and soon daily
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The PIM backbone
description: Long story short, value/cost ratio is outstanding. I have one platform to manage all of my clients projects. Happy clients, everyone is happy.
author: Periklis P.
pros: The available options make SS fit in every client infrastructure I wanted to implement it. Even if an endpoint is missing, it can get easily extended (until they add it, the team is working fast and the integration catalogue grows fast)
cons: Improvement on the look & feel would make it more friendly to non-technical users but apparently that should not be a priority at the moment in my opinion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It paid off in just 1 integration.
description: We have been using an e-commerce system for more than 1 year. Our system is not very flexible as it is an SAAS solution. Therefore, we need to take the data and process it outside. These data are very important, especially for use as a decision support system. It is not very easy to use the tool, but you can solve the important parts with a little effort. I started using it without much work, just by watching a few promotional videos. That's why I had a hard time at first, but eventually I managed to establish an integration. Only with this integration, the money I invested for this tool will pay for itself. However, I am just at the beginning and I find very interesting uses as I mix it up. By the way, I don't know if there is a problem with me, but for more than half an hour I searched for the Next button above the screen. I could not go to the next stage for a long time because I did not think of looking down at all :) However, it was waiting to be clicked right below :) Finally, I say definitely do not miss this opportunity. With these limits, you will have a lifetime First Class
author: Mustafa B.
pros: You can use SyncSpider for many cases. Actually, it is not true that the number of integrations is limited. Because, with custom integrations, you can add any integration you want. You can even share this integration with others. Thanks to this tool, there is no limit to what you can do with CSV and Google Sheet. These two alone can provide many use cases.
cons: You have to work to understand details. It is not easy to use but really powerful tool. Can you start to drive a truck easily? But after learn details and use some functions it can do lots of thing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic opportunity to cut workload
author: cam Z.
pros: Having an app that synchronizes your tasks across multiple apps can really streamline the way your business is run. Ideally we would be able to pay a development team to create a tailor made system for our business, but before that is a possibility its likely we would be using cheaper applications we can find readily built and available online. Sync spider allows those ready built apps to communicate, almost like you do in fact have a single tailor made software for your company. Of course there are other apps that exist doing the same thing, but the Team at Syncspider has reeaaaally shown some enthusiasm and hard work in developing this software to the expectation of its users in the last few months. and shows much promise to content with the heavy hitters like zapier. I am glad to have picked this up for a lifetime deal.
cons: as with any app syncing software its notlikely youd have access to every intergation you want, and to every process you want to automate. and so the only flaw is that its limited a the moment in what it can do. but that is the nature of the software, and all of these softwares exist to continually evolve and integrate with newer apps on the market.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The automation tool you need to save time and money
description: SyncSpider allows you to automate any digital business processes by integrating data from multiple platforms. I love the simplicity of it and how easy it is to use. Also, the team will be adding new apps daily to be integrated!
author: Jason Y.
pros: Easy to use and covers a lot of the common integrations and they have a great support team!
cons: Compared with other automation tools, syncspider may be lacking behind in the amount of app that can be integrated, however, the team is working hard to add more daily
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A wonderful tool for all appsumo fans
author: Manu D.
pros: I am a true compulsive buyer of appsumo deals and often I regret that the integration of a zapier needs to wait for months or even years. Here we have a tool developed by someone who, like me, is a fan of appsumo deals and who give priority to appsumo deals integration. If you take plenty appsumo deal, this one is for you! Thanks to them for thinking of us :)
cons: Still needs some intergration i really need : Pcloud, Oxatis for example
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Using Sync spider to replace Zapier
description: Very pleased–.
author: Gints G.
pros: Sync Spider will be the perfect addon for any Growth hacker or growth marketer that wants to connect multiple apps and tools. The tool is easy to use and set up, it has a wide range of connections, and the team is responsive to new connection requests. We use it mostly for slowly replacing things we normally did with Zapier and it saves us a lot of monthly marketing dollars. The UX is simple and neat, things are easy to find and I believe even a, not a user will have no difficulty finding their way around. Well recommended for both agency and product.
cons: So far I have been happy with the tool and nothing bad to say
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great experiences!
description: Great experiences! Nowadays, there are more and more applications of this type - the competition is increasing. I have tested most of them and I must say that SyncSpider has unique approach which I like the most. Yes, it is not ideal yet, but he's going in the right direction...
author: Piotr J.
pros: It's amazing how much you can do with just two connections: webhooks and external API - it's like a dream come true for someone existing in the world of web applications! How beautiful it works! You can do almost anything. At least for these two connections it is worth using SyncSpider... Besides, for example who else has a connection to Allegro - nr 1 marketplace in Poland? I have not found anywhere else - only in SyncSpider. I really like the direction in which the application is going. Also I look at the roadmap with hope and excitement! Keep the high level guys! I believe that you will reach the top because you have an excellent product - getting better every month ...
cons: The UI could have been more modern in my opinion. More detailed documentation would be useful also.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SyncSpider is a b2b synchronizing software with plenty of choice and growing
author: Francis R.
pros: Let's say you want to publish products from Cs-cart to Etsy: well... you can, and that's saying something, just like they planned to add Lazada and Shopee: You never heard of those marketplaces, but I need them. As the multichannel software with Cs-cart integration ? almost none. Even when you find what you want (Wordpress, Magento, Amazon...) multichannel software are highly expensive.
cons: It's not for everyone, unless you are ready to pay someone to setup the synchronization. For example, the product mapping will take hours. But if you want to export your user emails to some newsletter software, it's fast and easy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Value for Money and A Big Time Saver!
description: After signing up, I was provided with a warm welcome and their support team have been very responsive to my requests and have been helping me set up the various integrations for my business.
author: Tyrone S.
pros: In the past I've used tools like Zapier, Integrately and Pabbly which are all great tools as well. Though the monthly costs of running them and the additional tasks that we had to continuously pay for especially when you go over a certain limit doesn't justify the ongoing costs. That's why I considered SyncSpider.
cons: There are a few things I learnt which I hope they will eventually address is the trigger functions. Currently they only have 2 types - one through a scheduled time and the 2nd is triggered by a task within SyncSpider. If they can add another one that is triggered by the event change / update in the app it would be better - e.g. like an API trigger instead. I know I've been able to solve this issue using the Webhook function and that's worked exactly the way I expected.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A powerful automation software
description: In short, it's a powerful automation software, you can do almost everything, especially with just two connections: webhooks and external API - it's like a dream come true for someone existing in the world of modern web applications! It is a great platform to sync multiple e-Commerce websites. At least for these two connections above it is worth using SyncSpider a lot! SyncSpider also makes it easier to connect and sync many different apps and services. My strong example is if you are selling your products on multiple platforms like your WooCommerce store and Amazon. I really like the direction in which the application is going. Also I look at the roadmap with hope and excitement! Keep the great work guys! Definitely, a great powerful tool for automation to have around to grow your business in no time!
author: Claudiu G.
pros: You can do almost everything, especially with just two connections: webhooks and external API Stable and robust product A lot of connectors available
cons: I'm waiting for a LinkedIn connector to automate more. It is on the roadmap, so I will enjoy soon also this part!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Promising find
author: Peter L.
pros: I recently developed my shopify site, but have had a difficult time figuring out how to get all my different tools to work together. Confused and frustrated for a long time, I have been at a loss... So when i saw this offering pop up on appsumo, I jumped at the chance. That said, I had some questions as to whether it would work for my use case combining funnels, an ebook deliver platform, my book distributor warehouse's antiquated ordering system, etc. When i reached out to the developers, they not only responded immediately, they also offered to walk me through the possibilities and help solve some mission critical issues i was having. I was impressed with their willingness to work with me and am looking forward to exploring all the integration possibilities.
cons: I'm not sure yet as i haven't started...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bye bye integromat / zapier
description: good
author: Parag P.
pros: Syncspider capability is far more than integromat as it helps on load of ecomm automation. I am using freeium of zapier and integromat for long now and have been waiting for such a deal. Saw it. Got it. Thank you Syncspider. Improvements: Documentation.. i know you folks are working on it.
cons: Improvements: Documentation.. i know you folks are working on it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SyncSpider review
author: Thomas H.
pros: -> easy to understand - easy to implement-> very good support
cons: -> some features did not work properly (filter, manufacturer sku mapping for example)-> not really fast and efficient - stock update for ~1600 products is running for over 10 hours (you could at first sort every sku out that is not in the shopware database to update. At the moment it tries to update every line in the source-export.)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Solid Work in Progress
description: Overall, the tool is easy to use, though the UI can be a little slow at times, and the team behind it seem like a wonderful group of hardworking, committed folk who I am willing to trust will continue building this into an excellent product on par with Zapier and Integromat. Considering tools like these tend to be really expensive, especially Zapier, this is a great deal to jump on.
author: John C.
pros: I've been using SyncSpider now for about a week. One of my main reasons for purchasing was that it offered an easy integration with Wordpress which I couldn't get with either Integromat or Zapier. I ran into issues with Integromat and Zapier trying to sync posts between two sites. I had SyncSpider syncing posts within 10 minutes of signing up. So that's awesome. Support has been responsive, gracious and quick to implement a fix when needed.
cons: I did run into a few issues though while syncing posts. Tags didn't sync correctly and a drop-down menu didn't display all the available tags. I contacted support and they have already fixed the issue. There aren't as many integrations as in similar services.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is the timesaver i have been waiting for!
description: Saving time i can use on the rest of the business.
author: Victor B.
pros: The automation this software can handle is amazing. I have alot of repetitive tasks that helps me with. Usually i have some tasks i need to do over and over again with my products in google sheet. This is the absolutely in the top 5 software my business cant live without now.
cons: As of this moment, there is not too many integrations, but alot is planned, and they are making them quick. I just added a integration to their roadmap i hope to see, and the day after they asked to have a phone converstaion about how im using it so they can integrate it. AMAZING SERVICE!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
